Sirentide — User-journey map

Live renderer output — the SVG below was produced by Sirentide from the DSL beside it.

journey
title My working day
section Go to work
Make tea: 5: Me
Commute: 3: Me, Cat
Arrive: 4: Me
section Do work
Code: 5: Me
Meetings: 2: Me, Boss
Lunch: 4: Me, Team

A satisfaction map. section Name groups tasks; each Task: score: Actor[, Actor] plots a point at its 1-5 satisfaction score (higher sits higher), coloured on a red-to-green ramp, with the actors listed beneath. A line connects consecutive tasks; a per-section bracket spans its columns.

All seventeen types on one page: showcase.html · browser-audited renders: gallery
